title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo, Doflamingo Family, Tontatta, Zoro, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #17 as the dwarves of Green Bit draw Usopp and Robin into their rebellion, believing Usopp is the legendary hero who will save them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Owowow this is bad, real bad!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: cough

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I really screwed up!! He's gonna see me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: IF I DON'T RUN AWAY QUICKLY...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: 'Wica

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wah Wah I've done it now

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...So this is what a fairy really looks like!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What a failure! I'm a fool! An idiot! I knew this would happen at some point

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Are you a toy?

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: I'm no toy. I'm wica of the tontatta tribe!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: PLEASE KEEP IT A SECRET THAT YOU SAW ME!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Oh no!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I can't walk...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I think I sprained my leg just now

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm such a blunderer! A failure!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What's with that crazy strength,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're cracking the ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I have a request!! Please take me to my Commander !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Because you started all this so it's really all your fault

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's because you stole my sword !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We're the "Green Watchers" of this land! The people of this country...

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: THEY CALL US "FAIRIES" AND GIVE US ALL SORTS OF THINGS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: As part of the scouting unit, I'm in a hurry!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: I've got to inform my commander on the where- abouts of the Donquixote family!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: This is our chance!! It's been confirmed that the Donquixote family ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Has just set out to attack the ship of the Strawhat crew !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: kyahh! What a Blunder !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I went and spilled the beans on everything!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Wait, what you just said, are you serious!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I'm part of the Strawhat crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: KYAH what a failure!! I've screwed up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Stop destroying things!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: of all the people to be targeted, it had to be them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I've got to get to the sunny- go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Wait!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Please carry me to the flower fields first !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And then I can guide you to the beach!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: As if, I'll just head straight for the beach!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Then why are you heading in the opposite direction!? Don't you know how to get there!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So you're saying ...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: DoFlamingo's people have been following our movements this whole time!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That's right. We observed them doing so!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yes.... ah!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Are you guys also involved with Doflamingo somehow!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Shit....!! It's not just the ship that's in trouble.....!!! All of us are!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's a secret!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I don't have a den- den mushi, so I can't contact them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: 01, are we at these "flower Fields" yet?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Go up those stairs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Didn't I just say to take those stairs!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Are you by chance an imbecile !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Shut it!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Dressrosa: Corrida Colosseum

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: We've got another set of champs here in C-block!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: combatants are entering the ring one after the other!! The fight will begin shortly!!

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
